data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a deterministic correction model.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the deterministic correction model, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations related to this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for a deterministic correction model but does not provide specific evidence that this requirement is met. Therefore, the evidence is inconclusive regarding whether the requirement is satisfied.
gaps: No evidence confirming the deterministic correction model (append/reverse, no history overwrite).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
